question.label: Week three check-in
question.name: What's been most on your mind at work this week, Sam?
question.description: Safe opener that lets Sam set context before any friction is introduced.

answer: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.

assessment.note: He can execute tasks but is second-guessing whether his approach matches team expectations, signaling mild strain and a clear expectations gap.

new_queue.label: Team expectations
new_queue.name: When you second-guess, what team expectation feels hardest to read?

new_queue.label: Unclear expectations
new_queue.name: What part of the bar for a good ticket is still fuzzy?

new_queue.label: Handshake gaps
new_queue.name: Where do handoffs still leave you missing context?

new_queue.label: Shipping hesitation
new_queue.name: What usually makes you pause before shipping?

new_queue.label: Tool friction
new_queue.name: Which part of the toolchain slows you down most right now?

new_queue.label: Independence support
new_queue.name: What support from me would help you ship with less second-guessing?

new_queue.label: Next focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
